title: Out Wild - Horizons
description: Out Wild: Horizons is an adventure-driven modpack where exploration meets magic, with amplified ore generation and tech enhancing your journey through wild, untamed lands.
body:
**Out Wild - Horizons** is an expansive modpack designed to merge the thrill of adventure with the depth of technology and the wonder of magic. With amplified ore generation, massive biomes, and a multitude of Quality of Life enhancements, this pack transforms the way you explore and survive in the world. Whether you're delving into mysterious dimensions, building advanced machinery, or exploring vast wildernesses, the journey never ends.

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0098fa8c5070d9ac0a6474861c0427ec217bb9d.png)

**Technology and Power**

For those who thrive on tech progression, Out Wild: Horizons features powerful mods like Applied Energistics and Energized Power, giving you intricate systems for automation, power generation, and storage. Harness the sun with solar energy, or construct miniature power plants to keep your base running. ComputerCraft introduces programmable computers and robots, while early-game storage mods help you manage your items efficiently from the start.

Need to transfer items, fluids, or energy across dimensions? Tesseract makes it easier than ever to set up interdimensional networks. Farming is also streamlined with Industrial Foregoing, automating tasks and letting you focus on the bigger challenges ahead.

**Exploration and Dimensions**

The world is filled with secrets waiting to be uncovered. Structure mods enhance the landscape with countless new dungeons, ruins, and landmarks, making exploration a never-ending adventure. Go beyond the Overworld with dimension mods like The Undergarden, Eternal Starlight, and Starlands, each offering unique biomes, creatures, and challenges. For the space enthusiasts, Stellaris opens the door to interplanetary travel, allowing you to journey across the solar system and explore alien planets!

**Magic and Mysticism**

Harness the power of the arcane with a variety of magic mods. Theurgy lets you commune with ancient spirits, Wanderous guides you on mystical journeys, and Nature’s Aura connects you with the forces of nature to create magical wonders. Combine technology and magic to find the perfect balance, as each mod offers deep and complex systems for crafting, spellcasting, and rituals.

**Custom World Generation**

Explore a world filled with amplified ore generation, giving you more opportunities to find rare resources. The custom datapack ensures that biomes are larger and more diverse, creating vast landscapes to roam and discover. Whether you’re mining deep beneath the earth or trekking through enchanted forests, there’s always something new to uncover.

**Quality of Life Enhancements**

Out Wild: Horizons also offers plenty of Quality of Life improvements to make your gameplay experience smoother and more enjoyable. Manage your inventory with ease, craft early-game items like wooden hoppers or shears, and enjoy helpful features like rotten flesh recycling. Improve your farming efficiency with enhanced hoes that till larger areas based on the material, or take advantage of magnetic tools to attract dropped items with ease.

**Artifacts, Relics, and Wildlife**

Discover rare and powerful trinkets with the Artifacts and Relics mods, granting you magical abilities and passive bonuses. As you venture through this vibrant world, encounter a variety of creatures brought to life by the Living Things mod, adding an array of wildlife and enhancing the natural environment.

**Loot, Building, and Creativity**

Reward your efforts with Loot Bags, filled with random treasures to aid your journey. With a wide selection of decoration and building mods, creativity is limitless. Construct intricate bases, fortresses, or peaceful villages, and enjoy a world that feels alive and rich with detail.

**Omnidirectional Movement and Terrain Traversal**

Out Wild - Horizons introduces enhanced movement mechanics to make navigating the world more fluid and dynamic. With omnidirectional movement, you'll be able to move freely in any direction, while wall climbing and jumping let you scale cliffs, structures, and difficult terrain with ease. These abilities make rough landscapes and towering mountains much more accessible, ensuring that exploration is smooth and thrilling no matter where your journey takes you.

**Out Wild - Horizons** delivers an unforgettable experience by blending the best aspects of technology, magic, adventure, and creativity. Whether you’re a builder, explorer, or automator, this modpack has something for everyone. Venture beyond the wild, discover new horizons, and make your mark on the world!

**DISCLAIMER:** 

Allocate atleast 8GB of RAM to this Modpack.

Modpack contains >> [Mob Grinding Utils from Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mob-grinding-utils)

***

## **Support the work**

If you enjoy what I create, supporting the page helps me spend more time on updates, polishing features, fixing issues, and creating new content for future releases.

Every bit of support helps keep development going — thank you for making the next update possible.
